---
title: "AI Tools"
format: html
---

::: callout-important
# Page Maintenance

This page will be getting periodically updated due to the ever-evolving industry of AI.
:::

## Purpose of This Page

This page delineates currently available **Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools** that may support Psychology dissertation and research projects.\
Tools are grouped by **stage of the research lifecycle**, with emphasis on **supportive use** (e.g., planning, analysis assistance, visualisation) rather than replacement of scholarly judgement.

> Use of AI tools must always comply with institutional ethics policies, data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR), and academic integrity guidelines.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   ElevenLabs

<!-- -->

-   3DVista: https://www.3dvista.com/en/ - a 360-degree immersive creation platform for tours and simulations -
-   ElevenLabs: https://elevenlabs.io/ - an AI Voice platform (AI music, sound effects, podcasts etc.)
-   Google Vids: https://workspace.google.com/ - an AI-supported video and presentation creation program (only supported on some paid Google plans)
-   <https://suno.com/home>
-   <https://modelzoo.co/>
-   kimi.com
-   perchance.org/image-generator-professional
-   <https://huggingface.co/spaces/Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo>
-   <https://huggingface.co/tencent/HY-Motion-1.0>
-   MCP
